import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut count_0 = 0
  mut count_1 = 0
  mut count_2 = 0
  mut count_3 = 0
  mut count_4 = 0
  mut count_5 = 0
  mut count_6 = 0
  mut count_7 = 0
  mut count_8 = 0
  mut count_9 = 0

  mut i = 0
  while i < string.len(line)
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 48
      count_0 = count_0 + 1
    end
    if b == 49
      count_1 = count_1 + 1
    end
    if b == 50
      count_2 = count_2 + 1
    end
    if b == 51
      count_3 = count_3 + 1
    end
    if b == 52
      count_4 = count_4 + 1
    end
    if b == 53
      count_5 = count_5 + 1
    end
    if b == 54
      count_6 = count_6 + 1
    end
    if b == 55
      count_7 = count_7 + 1
    end
    if b == 56
      count_8 = count_8 + 1
    end
    if b == 57
      count_9 = count_9 + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut hashes_0 = ""
  mut j0 = 0
  while j0 < count_0
    hashes_0 = "#{hashes_0}#"
    j0 = j0 + 1
  end
  print("0: #{hashes_0}")

  mut hashes_1 = ""
  mut j1 = 0
  while j1 < count_1
    hashes_1 = "#{hashes_1}#"
    j1 = j1 + 1
  end
  print("1: #{hashes_1}")

  mut hashes_2 = ""
  mut j2 = 0
  while j2 < count_2
    hashes_2 = "#{hashes_2}#"
    j2 = j2 + 1
  end
  print("2: #{hashes_2}")

  mut hashes_3 = ""
  mut j3 = 0
  while j3 < count_3
    hashes_3 = "#{hashes_3}#"
    j3 = j3 + 1
  end
  print("3: #{hashes_3}")

  mut hashes_4 = ""
  mut j4 = 0
  while j4 < count_4
    hashes_4 = "#{hashes_4}#"
    j4 = j4 + 1

  print("4: #{hashes_4}")

  mut hashes_5 = ""

    hashes_5 = "#{hashes_5}#"

  print("5: #{hashes_5}")
